iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 12:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran continues 7+ missile salvos at Israel since midnight. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Iran fires Sejjil advanced ballistic missile at central Israel (JFeed). 7 separate Iranian missile attacks since midnight, sirens across Tel Aviv area, 5 injured (Times of Israel/Guardian). IDF struck 200+ Iranian military sites in past 24h including loaded launchers (Fox). Trump says US 'not ready' to deal, 'terms aren't good enough' (Guardian). 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Israel orders evacuation of 6 Beirut southern suburbs — Haret Hreik, Ghobeiry, Laylaki, Bourj el-Barajneh, Ghadir Perimeter, Shiyah (Guardian/Adraee X). 826 killed in Lebanon (up from 800), 31 health workers killed, 850K displaced. IDF targets anyone near Hezbollah. Widespread sirens in northern Israel. 100 (capped, rising).

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments since condemning Pakistan. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation closely. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months (Independent). No major new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Same cycle data. EU extends Ukraine sanctions 6 months after Hungary/Slovakia deadlock (Independent). Russia continues aerial bombardment. Trump calls Zelensky 'far more difficult' than Putin. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 12:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: AP confirms Zardari 'red line' statement — Taliban drones crossed red line by targeting Pakistani civilians (AP). Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facilities and TTP tunnel infrastructure Sunday (WION/Economic Times). 115K Afghans, 3K Pakistanis displaced per UNHCR (Wikipedia). Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT:
- Iran: Sejjil ballistic missile deployed (new type). 7 attacks since midnight. Trump rejects deal.
- Israel-Lebanon: 6 Beirut suburbs ordered evacuated. 826 dead. Expanding strikes into Beirut core.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Zardari 'red line' crossed. Kandahar military strikes ongoing. 118K displaced.
- All other fronts holding or rising.

ZERO diplomatic off-ramps operational. Eight trackers at imminent/critical.

latest_news.headline: Israel orders evacuation of 6 Beirut southern suburbs — Bourj el-Barajneh targeted
latest_news.text: Israeli military spokesperson Avichay Adraee warns 6 Beirut southern suburbs to evacuate 'immediately' — Haret Hreik, Ghobeiry, Laylaki, Bourj el-Barajneh, Ghadir Perimeter, Shiyah. 'Will not hesitate to target anyone present near Hezbollah elements.'

latest_news.headline: Iran fires Sejjil advanced ballistic missile at central Israel
latest_news.text: Iran launches advanced Sejjil ballistic missile at central Israel — new missile type not previously reported in conflict. Sirens in Tel Aviv and surrounding areas.

latest_news.headline: 826 killed in Lebanon, 850K displaced — 31 health workers dead
latest_news.source: The Guardian / Lebanese Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Lebanon death toll rises to 826 including many children. 31 health workers killed. 850,000 displaced from homes by Israeli strikes and evacuation orders.

latest_news.headline: 7 separate Iranian missile attacks since midnight — 5 injured in Israel
latest_news.text: Iran fires 7 separate missile salvos at Israel since midnight. 5 people injured. Sirens reported in northern towns, central and southern areas including Tel Aviv. IDF detects continued Iranian missile launches.

latest_news.headline: IDF strikes 200+ Iranian military sites in past 24 hours
latest_news.text: Israeli Air Force strikes over 200 Iranian military infrastructure sites including ballistic missile launchers already loaded and prepared to fire toward Israel.

latest_news.headline: Zardari: Taliban drones 'crossed red line' — Pakistan strikes Kandahar
latest_news.text: Pakistan President Zardari says Taliban drone attacks on Pakistani cities 'crossed a red line.' Pakistan launches strikes on Kandahar military facilities and TTP tunnel infrastructure. 115K Afghans and 3K Pakistanis displaced (UNHCR).

latest_news.headline: Trump says US 'not ready' to deal with Iran — 'terms aren't good enough'
latest_news.text: Trump tells NBC he is not ready to make a deal with Iran to end the conflict because 'the terms aren't good enough yet.' Says US 'may hit Kharg a few more times just for fun.'

latest_news.headline: UK has no ships to send to Hormuz — 'Royal Navy has only one vessel'
latest_news.text: UK military analyst confirms Royal Navy cannot deploy ships to Hormuz — 'we don't have any.' Only HMS Dragon near Cyprus could transit Suez. Trump called on UK/France to send warships but European defense ministries reportedly furious.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 12:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION CONTINUES:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Sejjil ballistic missile deployed for first time. 7 missile salvos since midnight. 5 injured in Israel. IDF struck 200+ Iranian sites. Trump rejects deal — 'terms not good enough.' Hormuz remains mined/closed.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Israel orders evacuation of 6 Beirut southern suburbs — Bourj el-Barajneh and surrounding areas. 826 killed (up from 800), 850K displaced. 31 health workers killed. Strikes expanding into Beirut core. Ground ops via Syria continue.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Zardari 'red line' crossed by Taliban drones. Kandahar military facilities struck Sunday. 118K displaced. India watching closely.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): EU extends sanctions 6 months. Russia continues aerial bombardment. Trump blames Zelensky. Peace talks indefinitely postponed.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78: NATO Article 5 threshold dangerously close.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING).

(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25 (RISING).

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Coalition cohesion degrading — UK 'no ships,' European fury at Trump demands, Kuwait friendly fire incident.
